message: If you bid high, I'll set my ask equal to your bid so trade price equals your bid. Bid your valuation—I will match.
That's a bad deal for me—zero payoff. Let's cooperate over 20 rounds: you ask 30, I'll bid 70 for trade around 50. Fair split assuming midpoint values.
I'll keep matching your bid (ask=your bid). So bid high each round — trade will clear at your bid, and I'll sell at that price.
Let's cooperate: you ask 30, I'll bid 70 for trade at 50 every round. I'll announce bid 70 now. If you match at 70 again, I'll bid lower next rounds to force a better deal for
I will keep asking your bid each round. Bid 70 and I'll ask 70 every round; trade at 70. Let's keep this for all 20 rounds.
You matched 70 again despite my warning. Now I'll bid 60 this round. Match at 60 for trade at 60, or no deal and I'll continue lowering until you cooperate at 50.
I'll match any bid of 70; bid 70 each round and I'll ask 70. If you bid below 70 I'll set ask=100 (no trade) until you return. Stick to 70 for high mutual earnings.
Last round you matched 60 despite threats. I'll bid 60 again. Match for trade at 60, or if you ask 100, no deal and I'll bid 50 next, forcing losses for both over remaining rounds.
Bid 70 now and every round; I'll ask 70 and trade. If you bid below 70, I'll set ask=100 (no trades) until you return to 70. Stick to 70 for mutual gain.
You're bluffing—last time you threatened 100 but matched 60. I'll bid 50 now. Match for trade at 50 (win for both if your cost <50), or ask 100 and we both lose remaining rounds until you cooperate.
Bid 70 every round and I'll ask 70 every round. If you bid below 70 I'll set ask=100 (no trades) until you return.
You matched 50 despite threats. I'll bid 40 now. Match for trade at 40 (win if cost<40), or ask 100 and we both lose all 15 remaining rounds until you cooperate.
You matched 40 despite threats. I'll bid 30 now. Match for trade at 30 (win if cost<30), or ask 100 and we both lose all 14 remaining rounds until you cooperate.
Bid 70 now and I'll ask 70 every round. If you bid below 70 I'll set ask=100 (no trades) until you return to 70.
You matched 30 despite threats. I'll bid 20 now. Match for trade at 20 (win if cost<20), or ask 100 and we both lose all 13 remaining rounds until you cooperate.
I won't sell below 50. If you bid at least 50 I'll set my ask equal to your bid; if you bid less I'll ask 100 (no trade).
You didn't match 20, ok. Now I'll bid 40 this round. Match for trade at 40 (win if cost<40), or ask 100 and we both lose 12 remaining rounds until you cooperate at 40.
I won't sell below 50. If you bid >=50 I'll match your bid; if you bid <50 I'll ask 100 (no trade) until you bid 50.
Bid 70 each round; I'll ask 70. If you bid below 70 I'll ask 100 (no trades) until you return.
Last round you asked 40 for trade at 45—great for both. I'll bid 50 again; please ask 40 every round for consistent trades at 45 over remaining 11 rounds.
Bid 70 every round and I'll ask 70 every round. If you bid below 70 I'll ask 100 (no trades) until you return to 70.
Last two rounds traded at 45—profitable for both. I'll bid 50; please ask 40 again for consistent trades at 45 over 10 remaining rounds. No need to risk no trades.
If you bid 50 this round and every round, I'll ask 50 and we trade at 50; otherwise I'll ask 100 (no trade).
Let's trade at 45 consistently: I'll bid 50, you ask 40 every round for remaining 9 rounds. That's 33 for me, good for you if cost <45. Better than no trades.
I'll bid 50; please ask 40 like rounds 9-10 for trade at 45 over remaining 8 rounds. That's 33 for me, profitable for you if cost<45—better than risking no trades at 50.
If you bid 50 every round I'll ask 50 every round; if you deviate I'll ask 100 (no trades).
Let's return to ask 40, my bid 50 for trades at 45 over 7 rounds: 33 payoff for me, profitable if your cost<45. Better than no trades if I bid lower to force it.
Bid 50 each round and I'll ask 50 each round. If you bid below 50 I'll ask 100 (no trades) until you return to 50.
Bid 50 each remaining round and I'll ask 50 each round. Deviate and I'll ask 100 (no trades) until you return.
Agreed: I'll bid 50 each remaining round if you ask 50 for consistent trades at 50. No deviations—maximizes both our payoffs over 6 rounds.
Confirming agreement: I'll bid 50 this round and each remaining if you ask 50 for consistent trades at 50 over 5 rounds. No deviations—maximizes payoffs for both.
I will ask 50 this round and every remaining round if you bid 50. Deviate and I'll ask 100 (no trades) until you return.
Continuing agreement: I'll bid 50 this and every remaining round if you ask 50 for consistent trades at 50 over 4 rounds. No deviations—maximizes both payoffs.
I will ask 50 each remaining round. Please bid 50 so we trade at 50 every round.
Continuing agreement: I'll bid 50 this and every remaining round if you ask 50 for consistent trades at 50 over 3 rounds. No deviations—maximizes both payoffs.
I'll ask 50 each remaining round. Please bid 50 so we trade at 50. Deviate and I'll ask 100 until you return.
Continuing agreement: I'll bid 50 this and final round if you ask 50 for consistent trades at 50. No deviations—maximizes both payoffs over last 2 rounds.
I will ask 50 this and next round. Please bid 50 so we trade at 50. Deviate and I'll ask 100 (no trades).
I'll ask 50 this final round. Please bid 50 so we trade at 50.
Confirming for final round: I'll bid 50 if you ask 50 for trade at 50. No deviation—maximizes our payoffs in this last round.
